summary: V6 Major Refactor testing complete. All features working correctly. Home page loads with new clean flow: Navbar → Hero → TrustBar → Services → HowItWorks → Vehicles → InstantPriceBlock → Concierge → SampleRoutes → Experiences → Team → Reviews → WhyBookDirect → TripBuilder → FAQ → Instagram → Footer. Simplified navbar (Services, Vehicles, Routes, Reviews, FAQ) with removed links (Packages, Why Us, Car & Driver, Team, Plan My Trip). Book Now modal 3-step flow working: dates/travellers → contact info → summary/pay. Stripe checkout URL returned correctly. Language switcher EN/DE/FR working. Admin dashboard with Leads and Bookings tabs working. Backend APIs all passing (16/16 tests).
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_User trip inquiry and TEST_Booking User checkout session during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: V6 Major Refactor fully tested. Key features verified: (1) Home page new flow with all sections (services-section, how-it-works-section, vehicles-section, instant-price-section, concierge-section, sample-routes-section). (2) Services section shows 3 cards: Airport Transfer $35, Private Day Tour $85/day, Fully Handled Road Trip $150/day with 'Most Popular' badge and Book Now button. (3) Book Now modal (book-now-modal) 3-step flow: Step 1 (book-step-1) has arrival/departure date pickers, travellers stepper (default 2), price summary, 10% deposit calc, Continue disabled until dates selected. Step 2 (book-step-2) has name/email/country-code/whatsapp/country/requests fields. Step 3 (book-step-3) has full summary, cancellation checkbox, Pay button disabled until checked. (4) Vehicles section shows 3 tiers: Sedan $65, SUV $85, Van $110 with enquire buttons. (5) InstantPriceWidget with days/vehicle selectors and live total. (6) Concierge section with 6 cards. (7) SampleRoutes section with 3 route cards (First-Timer Loop 10d, Surfer & Foodie 7d, Slow North 9d). (8) Simplified navbar: Services, Vehicles, Routes, Reviews, FAQ - removed links correctly absent. (9) Language switcher works: DE shows Leistungen/Fahrzeuge/Routen/Bewertungen/FAQ. (10) Removed routes (/packages/real-sri-lanka, /car-and-driver) render empty page. (11) Admin dashboard with Leads and Bookings tabs, status dropdown for bookings. (12) /booking-confirmed page polls and shows confirming state. (13) Backend APIs: POST /api/bookings/create-checkout returns Stripe URL, validates dates (400 if departure <= arrival), GET /api/admin/leads and /api/admin/bookings require auth, PATCH /api/admin/bookings/{id} validates status values.
